title.en: Nine-story building, the highest gold mountain!

content.en:
Nine-story building, the highest gold mountain!

The town guard power here is very strong, with a supreme ninefold ancestor sitting in the town for a long time, and there are many ninefold ancestors practicing here.

This place is directly connected to the origin of the Silent Black Sea, so the energy intensity is no less than that of the truncated Source Sea.

Ye Tian is also the first time to come here, after all, he is not usually qualified to enter here, only when he becomes a Ninefold Origin Ancestor or when he is impacting a Ninefold Origin Ancestor, he is eligible to enter here.

After entering the Supreme Golden Mountain, Ye Tian entered a time and space dedicated to retreat and breakthrough, and then began to retreat to attack the Ninefold Ancestor.

The key to impacting the Ninefold Origin Ancestor is to condense the Will Dao Flower, but it is difficult for the Will Dao Flower to condense alone, so it needs to be condensed at the moment of breakthrough and integrated into the Life Dao Flower and the Yuan Dao Flower, so as to form the three flowers in one and form the Immeasurable Dao Flower.

It is precisely because of the Immeasurable Dao Flower that even if the half-step Ninefold Primordial Ancestor does not condense the Immeasurable Will, the Immeasurable Will will be born immediately after becoming the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor.

Ye Tian had even condensed his immeasurable will, and they had surpassed the ordinary Ninefold Ancestor, so it was very easy for him to condense the will Dao Flower.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian's will gradually turned into a Dao Flower, and then merged into the Life Dao Flower and the Yuan Dao Flower that had been perfectly fused.

Rumble!!!!

The three Dao Flowers quickly fused and gradually turned into immeasurable Dao Flowers, and the process was very fast.

It didn't take long for the Infinite Dao Flower to form.

At the same time, the shackles in the darkness seemed to shatter at the touch of a button.

Click!!

The shackles of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor were easily shattered by Ye Tian without encountering any difficulties.

Then, Ye Tian's body began to transform, and his immeasurable will also skyrocketed.

Every moment, Ye Tian's aura was increasing, and his strength was skyrocketing at an incredible speed.

The energy of the Supreme Golden Mountain surged and merged into Ye Tian's body, helping him quickly complete the breakthrough.

Deep in the Supreme Golden Mountain.

"Endless Dao Ancestor has broken through!"

A powerhouse at the peak of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor said.

"Yes, I didn't expect the Endless Dao Ancestor to break through to the Ninefold Origin Ancestor realm so quickly, this speed is too fast!"

"I remember that it didn't take long for the Endless Dao Ancestor to become a half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor, and as a result, he became a Ninefold Origin Ancestor so quickly!"

"I haven't been in retreat for long, and I heard that the Endless Dao Ancestor is only in the Eightfold Origin Ancestor realm, but in the blink of an eye, the Endless Dao Ancestor came to the Supreme Golden Mountain, and then became the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, it's incredible!"

"Endless Dao Ancestor has now stepped into the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor, I don't know what level his strength has improved!"

"It should be comparable to the average Ninefold Ancestor, after all, it has just broken through, how powerful can it be?"

"However, with the growth speed of the Endless Dao Ancestor, he may soon surpass me and others!"

"Yes, the limit of our life level is 100, but the life limit of the Endless Dao Ancestor can exceed 100! After the life level reaches 100, every improvement is a transformation of the life level!"

While these Ninefold Primordial Ancestors were discussing, Ye Tian gradually stabilized the realm.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to get out of the customs.

First, he tested his immeasurable will.

Soon, the results came in.

"28.2 scales!"

Seeing this result, Ye Tian was very excited.

When the other Ninefold Primordial Ancestors had just broken through, the Infinite Will Scale was only 3 scales, and although it could be quickly increased to 10 scales, compared to him, it was much worse.

Moreover, he has just broken through, and in the next period of time, his immeasurable will will will be easily improved, and it can definitely be easily raised to more than 30, and it may even reach the level of 40 scales.

Not only that, Ye Tian's immeasurable will has also undergone a transformation, and his body has transformed, and his physical strength is at least dozens of times that of the past.

In addition, his life level has also been greatly improved, directly reaching the level of 96.

With just one breakthrough, Ye Tian's strength completely surpassed the past many times, enough to easily defeat his past self.

With his current strength, the ordinary Ninefold Origin Ancestor was far from being his opponent, and he was already comparable to those old Ninefold Origin Ancestor powerhouses.

"Breaking through to become a Ninefold Ancestor, I'm now on the top of the Nine-Story Building!"

Ye Tian muttered.

No, not long after he broke through, the reward of the Nine-Story Building came down.

The first is a resource, which every Ninefold Ancestor has, and these resources are enough for him to quickly cultivate for a period of time.

Secondly, it is the appointment of him, and this appointment is chosen by Ye Tian himself.

He can go to a certain ground building to serve as a deputy owner, or he can serve as a senior member of a certain sky building.

Of course, Ye Tian can also continue to keep the position of the deputy owner of the Xuanlou who is now truncated, this is his choice.

After some consideration, Ye Tian still kept the position of the deputy owner of the Xuanlou who was cut off unchanged.

After all, even if you go to the Sky Tower, it doesn't make much sense.

He became the Ninefold Ancestor, and he was already a high-rise of the Nine-Story Building, so going to any of the buildings would not help.

And with his growth rate, he will soon become the top executive of the Nine Stories Building, and he is a real chess player, so there is no need to care about this small position.

Moreover, after becoming a Ninefold Origin Ancestor, Ye Tian could practice in the Supreme Golden Mountain for a long time in the future, but he needed to pay points, which was also the reason why many Ninefold Origin Ancestors would still earn points.

However, it is very easy for the Ninefold Ancestor to earn points, such as the cost of preaching, and he may be able to earn hundreds of millions of points at one time, but there will not be too many opportunities like that, basically they are arranged by the Nine-Story Building, and then he will divide a part of the points himself.

Ye Tian was not in a hurry to go out for the time being, so he found a place in the Supreme Golden Mountain as his long-term cave mansion and retreated here.

At the same time, Ye Tian also made friends with the other Ninefold Ancestors of the Nine-Fold Building here.

In this way, time passed slowly, Ye Tian's cultivation became more and more sophisticated, his immeasurable will became stronger and stronger, and his life level was also higher and higher.

In the blink of an eye, tens of billions of years of the Primordial Era have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian was using the resources rewarded by the Ninefold Building to greatly improve his strength, and his life level had already reached 100, which was also the limit of the life level of an ordinary Ninefold Ancestor.

And his immeasurable will has also reached the level of 40 scales, and at this time, he gradually feels that the increase in the scale of immeasurable will has decreased a lot, and it is obvious that the period of rapid improvement is over.

"I have to test my combat effectiveness!"

Ye Tian muttered.
